Title: Flavor-based branding and customization

Description:
Add a configuration approach to customize colors, logos, and metadata per event (product-flavor style). For web, support a configuration file or environment variables per deployment.

Why:
Makes it easy to rebrand the app for specific events.

Acceptance criteria:
- Provide a `config/event.json` pattern and apply brand colors and logos at build/runtime.
- Document how to add an event configuration.

Labels: enhancement
